meta.summary: Fast RNA-seq pseudoalignment and quantification with index, quant, quant-tcc, BUS, HDF5, pseudobam, and genomebam support.
meta.description: Fast RNA-seq pseudoalignment and quantification with index, quant, quant-tcc, BUS, HDF5, pseudobam, and genomebam support.

test: kallisto 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: kallisto <CMD>' >/dev/null && kallisto cite | grep -F 'Nature Biotechnology' >/dev/null

kallisto index 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: kallisto index' >/dev/null && kallisto quant 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: kallisto quant' >/dev/null && kallisto quant-tcc 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: kallisto quant-tcc' >/dev/null && kallisto bus 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: kallisto bus' >/dev/null && kallisto h5dump 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:  kallisto h5dump' >/dev/null && kallisto inspect 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: kallisto inspect' >/dev/null
kallisto quant 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--pseudobam' >/dev/null && kallisto quant 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--genomebam' >/dev/null && ldd /opt/kallisto/bin/kallisto | grep -F 'libhdf5' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-kallisto-index && cd /tmp/taf-kallisto-index && printf '>tx1
ACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTAGCTAGTCCGATGACCTGACTGATCGGTTACGATGCTAGTACCGATCGTACGATGGCATCGTACGAA
>tx2
TTCAGGCTACGATGCTAGGATCGATACCGTTAGCTGACTGACCTAGGCTTACGATCCGTAGCTAACGATGCTGATCGTACCTGAGCTAGCTT
' > transcripts.fa && gzip -c transcripts.fa > transcripts.fa.gz && kallisto index -i transcripts.idx transcripts.fa.gz && test -s transcripts.idx && kallisto inspect transcripts.idx > inspect.txt 2>&1 && grep -F '[index] number of targets: 2' inspect.txt >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-kallisto-quant && cd /tmp/taf-kallisto-quant && printf '>tx1
ACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTAGCTAGTCCGATGACCTGACTGATCGGTTACGATGCTAGTACCGATCGTACGATGGCATCGTACGAA
>tx2
TTCAGGCTACGATGCTAGGATCGATACCGTTAGCTGACTGACCTAGGCTTACGATCCGTAGCTAACGATGCTGATCGTACCTGAGCTAGCTT
' > transcripts.fa && kallisto index -i transcripts.idx transcripts.fa && printf '@r1
ACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTAGCTAGTCCGATGACCTGACTGATCGG
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
@r2
TTCAGGCTACGATGCTAGGATCGATACCGTTAGCTGACTGACCTAGGCTT
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && kallisto quant -i transcripts.idx -o quant -t 1 --single -l 60 -s 5 -b 1 reads.fq && test -s quant/abundance.tsv && test -s quant/abundance.h5 && grep -F '"n_targets": 2' quant/run_info.json >/dev/null && kallisto h5dump -o h5txt quant/abundance.h5 && test -s h5txt/abundance.tsv && grep -F 'target_id' h5txt/abundance.tsv >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-kallisto-pbam && cd /tmp/taf-kallisto-pbam && printf '>tx1
ACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTAGCTAGTCCGATGACCTGACTGATCGGTTACGATGCTAGTACCGATCGTACGATGGCATCGTACGAA
>tx2
TTCAGGCTACGATGCTAGGATCGATACCGTTAGCTGACTGACCTAGGCTTACGATCCGTAGCTAACGATGCTGATCGTACCTGAGCTAGCTT
' > transcripts.fa && kallisto index -i transcripts.idx transcripts.fa && printf '@r1
ACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTAGCTAGTCCGATGACCTGACTGATCGG
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && kallisto quant -i transcripts.idx -o pbam -t 1 --single -l 60 -s 5 --pseudobam reads.fq && test -s pbam/pseudoalignments.bam

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-kallisto-bus && cd /tmp/taf-kallisto-bus && printf '>tx1
ACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTAGCTAGTCCGATGACCTGACTGATCGGTTACGATGCTAGTACCGATCGTACGATGGCATCGTACGAA
>tx2
TTCAGGCTACGATGCTAGGATCGATACCGTTAGCTGACTGACCTAGGCTTACGATCCGTAGCTAACGATGCTGATCGTACCTGAGCTAGCTT
' > transcripts.fa && kallisto index -i transcripts.idx transcripts.fa && printf '@r1
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAACCCCCCCCCC
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > r1.fq && printf '@r1
ACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTAGCTAGTCCGATGACCTGACTGATCGG
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > r2.fq && kallisto bus -i transcripts.idx -o bus -x 10xv2 -t 1 r1.fq r2.fq && test -s bus/output.bus && test -s bus/matrix.ec && test -s bus/transcripts.txt && grep -F '"n_targets": 2' bus/run_info.json >/dev/null
